summary: Plan-only classification: #80499 remains the best live canonical for the Claude ACP config-control family, but it is not merge-ready because Codex review still has an unresolved P2 finding. #84916, #90968, and #91479 are related ACP timeout/model/control-plane work with distinct scopes, so no duplicate/superseded closeout is planned. Closed linked refs #87404 and #89685 stay historical context only.

actions.reason: Best focused surviving canonical for the Claude ACP config-control root cause, but only as canonical classification; no merge is planned.
